raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declaring a reflective commitment to nuance when experiencing polarized thinking",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "All-or-nothing frames of mind are recognizable to the speaker",
    "Partial truths exist on both sides of relevant issues",
    "The speaker possesses the willingness and capacity to identify those partial truths"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; presents a consistent self-description of cognitive flexibility without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker's behavior must align with the stated willingness, and the issues in question must genuinely contain defensible elements on multiple sides",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is offered as self-praise or deflection while the speaker continues to dismiss one side entirely, or when 'partial truth' is invoked to falsely equate positions of unequal validity"
}
